# Task Board

Task Board coordinates household tasks between humans and workers.

Production base URL: https://task-board.oorangy.com
OpenAPI: /api/v1/openapi.json
Worker guide: /docs/agents.md
API conventions: /docs/api.md
Worker contract: /docs/worker-contract.md

API rules:
- Send `Authorization: Bearer $TASK_BOARD_TOKEN` on every `/api/v1` request except OpenAPI.
- Call `/api/v1/whoami` first and stop unless it is the expected active worker.
- Workers do not list, fetch, patch, cancel, reopen, or browse tasks.
- Request work with `POST /api/v1/work/ready`; `project_id` is optional and count defaults to one.
- Ready frontloads matching doing tasks, then fills the window with actionable todo tasks.
- Reconcile deliveries by task ID; never duplicate an executor for resumed work.
- A 204 ready response invokes no LLM, script, or executor.
- Complete owned work through `POST /api/v1/work/{task_id}/complete` using one reporter.
- Persist and retry an identical completion body after an ambiguous response.
- Every created task requires a project; use stable idempotency keys for retryable creation.
- Never send `created_by` or place credentials in task text, results, or logs.
